onboarding_links_desc: Connect your platforms so fans can find your music everywhere.

welcome_message_body:
We're thrilled to have you on board. Your artist profile is now active on the darkTunes platform.

Use this portal to manage your releases, tour dates, press materials, and more. If you have any questions, just reply to this message — we're here to help.

Welcome to the family! 🎶

invoices_desc: Create and manage invoices for performance fees, remix commissions, and other services.

invoice_billing_incomplete: Please complete your billing profile before creating invoices.

invoice_error: Failed to save invoice. Please try again.

invoice_confirm_send: Send this invoice to the client?

invoice_small_business: Small business (§ 19 UStG) — no VAT charged
invoice_generator_error: Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.
documents_desc: Secure storage for contracts, split agreements, and GEMA filings.

help_intro: Everything you need to know about using the Artist Portal.
help_epk_body: Fill in your biography, social links, and contacts in the Profile tab. Use the EPK tab to preview how your press kit looks to bookers and journalists. You can reorder sections, hide ones you don't need, and download the EPK as a PDF. Upload high-quality photos — bookers use them for flyers and event listings.
help_releases_body: Submit new releases for review using the 'Submit New Release' button. Once approved, your release appears in the list. Each upcoming release has a pre-release checklist — work through the tasks to make sure nothing is missed before launch day. Releases that are already out are shown below the checklist in a 'Released' section for reference.
help_events_body: Add events using the form at the top. Fill in the venue name, city, and country, then click 'Look Up on Map' to verify the location. You can add a ticket URL, a YouTube trailer, and tag other darkTunes artists as supporting acts. Use 'Export ICS' to download all your upcoming shows as a calendar file.
help_invoices_body: Create professional invoices for gig fees, remix commissions, or any service. Fill in client details, add line items with description, quantity, and price, then choose whether to send the invoice by email to the client and/or a copy to the label. A PDF is generated automatically and available for download at any time.
help_statements_body: Royalty statements are uploaded by the label and appear here as downloadable PDF files. They summarise your earnings from streaming, downloads, and sync licensing for a given accounting period.
help_settings_body: Change your account password here. You can also switch the portal language between English and German — the selected language is shown above the button so you always know the current state.
calendar_disabled: The Release Calendar is currently unavailable. Please contact the label for more information.
